background.key_experience: Got doxxed and harassed for 48 hours in high school after accidentally liking a controversial political tweet, leading to panic attacks and therapy—now believes all social media platforms are inherently unsafe but still uses them compulsively.

cognition.core_value: Personal safety and avoiding public shame at all costs—will abandon any opinion if it risks backlash.
cognition.bias: Bandwagon effect—immediately adopts whatever stance is trending in their online circles, triggered by seeing a tweet with over 10k likes or a viral TikTok.

current_state.recent_memory: Watched a YouTube video yesterday claiming a new app tracks users' locations without consent, spent hours anxiously checking phone permissions but didn't actually research the claim.
